human_confirmation_questions: Which file is the current estimator source for the Temp Power work?
Is Estimator R3 - Project Miner Temp Power Testing.xlsm the current Temp Power estimator, a test workbook, or a scratch copy?
Is Cupertino - Miner Estimator PHX Bldg A & B MV Rev9.xlsm part of the current Project Miner work, or a related/older estimator reference?
Is RESA Power - Project Data Entry MASTER.xlsm still the intended apparatus/task planning workbook for turning estimator output into PM review rows?
Is Garney- Central Mesa Reuse Tracker #677562.xlsm an example/import-planning reference only, or does it still carry current process logic?
Which drawing files should be considered current for Temp Power scope review?
Are the two upcoming New Mexico data-center projects represented in this folder, or is a separate source package still expected?
Which source files may be safely opened later by an admitted review packet, and which should remain metadata-only?
Which source artifacts must be excluded from Git or only referenced as external local/Box sources?
What candidate identity should be used later, if and only if a separate no-write candidate review packet is admitted?
